ref: I am having asthma attacks and experiencing pins and needle sensations in my chest, arms, and hands. My family has also been ill with chest congestion, and we have all been coughing a lot. I have had two heart stents placed in the last eleven months. Should I just try to stay comfortable and endure the horrible sensations when coughing, or should I be seen? I haven’t had asthma attacks in a few years either. Never mind, I was hoping you could help; I didn’t realize there was a fee.
